text:
NAME: GHOPDCD 

LONG NAME: GHO_PD_CD 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

SOURCE: NCH 

VALUES: 1 = Yes, paid by GHO/MCO 
Null/missing = Not paid by GHO/MCO 

COMMENT: This field comes from the GHO-paid (aka MCO paid) indicator that is present on the first claim record 
included in the stay. 
 ^ Back to TOC ^
